route: Surabaya - Bromo Midnight Tour - Surabaya
itinerary_title: Overnight Adventure in Bromo: Midnight Departure from Surabaya
estimated_duration: ~14 - 16 Hours (Total from pick-up to return drop-off)
main_activities: Night trip, Bromo Jeep tour (sunrise & crater), back to Surabaya.
customer_tips: This is a very tiring tour. It's highly recommended to get plenty of sleep and rest before the tour begins. Bring a neck pillow for comfort in the car.
overview: Forget the hotel and sleep on the road! This quick adventure picks you up from Surabaya at midnight and takes you through the darkness straight to the foot of Mount Bromo. You'll switch to a 4WD Jeep for an off-road adventure, witness a magical sunrise, climb the crater, and return to Surabaya in the afternoon. This is an intense and highly efficient route for those with limited time.

route: Surabaya - Bondowoso (Ijen Area)
itinerary_title: Towards the Ijen Plateau: Overland Travel from Surabaya to Bondowoso
main_activities: Private pickup, ground travel, check-in,Health Check (MCU) at the hotel.
accommodation_status: Check-in & Stayat hotels/homestays in the Bondowoso area.
customer_tips: MCU: This is a mandatory procedure from the National Park. The screening is very simple and quick, involving only a basic check of your vital signs such as blood pressure to ensure you are fit to climb. MCU Fee: The MCU is already included in the package
overview: This long journey is the perfect transition from the hustle and bustle of Surabaya to the tranquility of the mountains. After arriving and checking in, a medical professional will come to your hotel for a brief, comfortable health check. Afterward, enjoy a well-prepared dinner to conclude your day.

route: Surabaya - Banyuwangi (Ijen Area)
itinerary_title: North Coast Expedition: The Long Journey from Surabaya to Banyuwangi
main_activities: Private pickup, long road trip, check-in,Health Check (MCU) at the hotel.
accommodation_status: Check-in & Stayat a hotel/homestay in the Banyuwangi area.
customer_tips: MCU:This is the proceduremustfrom the National Park. The screening is very simple and quick, only involving checking your vital signs (such as blood pressure) to ensure you are fit enough to climb. MCU Fee:The examination fee isIDR 35,000 per person not includedin the package and can be paid directly to medical personnel.
overview: This is an epic road trip along the north coast of Java. After the long journey and check-in at your hotel, medical personnel will come to perform a brief and comfortable health check. Afterward, you can relax as dinner is prepared.

route: Surabaya - Cemoro Lawang (Bromo Area)
itinerary_title: Gateway to the Clouds: Your Journey from Surabaya to Mount Bromo
main_activities: Private pick-up, overland travel, check-in at mountain hotel.
accommodation_status: Check-in & Stayat hotels/homestays in the Bromo area.
customer_tips: Temperatures at Bromo can drop to 10-15Â°C. Pack a jacket and rest early.
overview: Your adventure begins when we pick you up from Surabaya. Enjoy a comfortable ride as the scenery changes from the city to the cool Tengger mountains. You'll feel the temperature drop, signaling your arrival at Cemoro Lawang, a magical village on the rim of the Bromo crater.

route: Surabaya - Lumajang (Tumpak Sewu Area)
itinerary_title: The Path to Waterfall Paradise: The Journey from Surabaya to Tumpak Sewu
main_activities: Private pick-up, road trip, check-in at accommodation near nature.
accommodation_status: Check-in & Stayat the homestay/cottage in the Tumpak Sewu area.
customer_tips: Accommodations in this area are generally more basic. Phone reception may be limited, but hotels offer Wi-Fi.
overview: This journey from Surabaya will take you south, passing through small towns and plantations, experiencing the authentic East Javanese countryside before arriving in Lumajang, home to the magnificent Tumpak Sewu.

route: Surabaya - Safari Park - Bromo Area
itinerary_title: From Wildlife to Volcano Peak: Safari Park Tour & Onward to Bromo
main_activities: Safari Park tour, transfer to Bromo, check-in.
accommodation_status: Check-in & Stayat hotels/homestays in the Bromo area.
customer_tips: This route is very efficient for combining two different types of tours in one day.
overview: A perfect day for a double adventure! Starting in Surabaya, you'll explore Prigen Safari Park, interacting with wildlife up close. In the afternoon, continue your journey uphill to Mount Bromo, ready for the next day's sunrise adventure.

route: Surabaya Hotel - Surabaya City Tour - Surabaya Hotel
itinerary_title: The Pulse of the City of Heroes: A One-Day Tour of Surabaya
main_activities: Visit monuments, museums, unique places of worship, and iconic bridges.
customer_tips: Wear modest clothing when visiting places of worship. Surabaya can be very hot.
overview: Explore Surabaya's rich history and culture. Feel the spirit of struggle at the Heroes' Monument, smell the aroma of tobacco at the House of Sampoerna, witness the cultural blend at the Cheng Ho Mosque, and marvel at the city's majestic modern icon, the Suramadu Bridge.

route: Surabaya - Yogyakarta (via Train)
itinerary_title: Across Java: Transfer from Surabaya to Yogyakarta
main_activities: Transfer to Station/Overland travel, arrival in Yogyakarta, check-in hotel.
accommodation_status: Check-in & Stayat a hotel in the Yogyakarta area.
customer_tips: Traveling by train is highly recommended because it is faster and more comfortable.
overview: Continue your adventure to the heart of Javanese culture. Enjoy a long road trip through the heart of Java, or choose the faster and more comfortable train option, taking in views of rice paddies and distant volcanoes.

route: Surabaya Hotel - Surabaya Airport
itinerary_title: Convenient Delivery to Juanda Airport
main_activities: Breakfast, check-out, transfer to the airport.
customer_tips: It is important to leave for the airport early to anticipate traffic jams and the check-in process. Starting from Bali
overview: After enjoying your final breakfast at the hotel, take advantage of some free time before we pick you up for a quiet and stress-free transfer to Juanda International Airport (SUB) for your onward flight.

route: Bali Hotel - Gilimanuk Ferry - Banyuwangi (Ijen Area)
itinerary_title: Cross-Strait Adventure: From Bali to Banyuwangi (Ijen Area)
main_activities: Overland travel in Bali, ferry crossing, check-in,Health Check (MCU) at the hotel.
accommodation_status: Check-in & Stayat a hotel/homestay in the Banyuwangi area.
customer_tips: MCU:This is the proceduremustfrom the National Park. The screening is very simple and quick, only involving checking your vital signs (such as blood pressure) to ensure you are fit enough to climb. MCU Fee:The examination fee isIDR 35,000 per person not includedin the package and can be paid directly to medical personnel.
overview: Your unique adventure begins with a road trip across the western part of Bali to Gilimanuk Harbor. Upon arrival in Banyuwangi, after check-in, medical personnel will visit you at your hotel for a convenient medical check-up, before enjoying a awaited dinner.

route: Bali Hotel - Gilimanuk Ferry - Bondowoso (Ijen Area)
itinerary_title: Crossing the Strait to the Foot of Ijen: From Bali to Bondowoso
main_activities: Land travel, ferry crossing, check-in,Health Check (MCU) at the hotel.
accommodation_status: Check-in & Stayat hotels/homestays in the Bondowoso area.
customer_tips: MCU: This is a mandatory procedure from the National Park. The screening is very simple and quick, involving only a basic check of your vital signs such as blood pressure to ensure you are fit to climb. MCU Fee: The MCU is already included in the package
overview: This island-hopping adventure takes you from the beaches of Bali to the highlands of Ijen. After the long journey and check-in, medical personnel will come to your hotel for a comfortable, mandatory medical check-up. Afterward, you can relax and enjoy the dinner we've prepared.

route: Bali Hotel - Gilimanuk Ferry - Cemoro Lawang (Bromo Area)
itinerary_title: Marathon Expedition: From Bali Beaches to Mount Bromo
main_activities: Very long overland journey, ferry crossing, check-in at Bromo.
accommodation_status: Check-in & Stayat hotels/homestays in the Bromo area.
overview: Get ready for an epic day of travel! This route is designed for true adventurers, taking you from Bali, across the strait, and straight on to a long overland journey across East Java to Mount Bromo. You'll witness the most dramatic landscape changes in a single day.

route: Ijen Area - Ijen Tour - Cemoro Lawang (Bromo Area)
itinerary_title: From Two Peaks: Ijen Adventure Continues to Mount Bromo
main_activities: Ijen tour, long transfer, check-in at Bromo.
customer_tips: Take advantage of the long journey to rest after waking up very early.
overview: After conquering Ijen, your adventure continues west. Enjoy our prepared lunch to refuel before embarking on the long overland journey to the majestic volcanic landscape of Bromo.

route: Ijen Area - Ijen Tour - Papuma Beach - Jember
itinerary_title: From the Blue Fire of Ijen to the Golden Sunset of Papuma
main_activities: Ijen hike, coffee plantation visit, enjoying sunset on the beach.
customer_tips: It was a very long and tiring day.
overview: Today was a mix of extreme adventure and relaxation. We began with a climb to Ijen, followed by lunch to recharge. Afterward, we headed south to the coast to close the day with a sunset at Papuma Beach.

route: Banyuwangi Hotel - Bangsring Underwater Tour - Banyuwangi Hotel
itinerary_title: Underwater Charm: Snorkeling & Conservation at Bangsring Underwater
main_activities: Snorkeling, visiting floating houses, interaction with sharks in captivity.
customer_tips: Use reef-friendly sunscreen. Bring an underwater camera if you have one.
overview: Start your day with a leisurely breakfast at the hotel. Afterward, leave the land for a brief underwater adventure. From Banyuwangi, we'll head to Bangsring, where you can snorkel in crystal-clear waters, see beautiful coral reefs, and even swim with baby sharks in a safe breeding area.

route: Banyuwangi Hotel - Ketapang Ferry - Bali Hotel
itinerary_title: Returning to the Island of the Gods: Crossing from Banyuwangi to Bali
main_activities: Breakfast, check-out, transfer to the port, ferry crossing, land tour in Bali.
customer_tips: You will "lose" 1 hour when you arrive in Bali. Starting from the Bromo Area (Cemoro Lawang)
overview: Enjoy your last breakfast in Java. After check-out, we will transfer you to Ketapang Harbor for the ferry ride back to Bali. This is a moment of reflection as you leave the mainland of Java. Upon arrival in Gilimanuk, our driver will be ready to take you back to your hotel in Bali.

route: Bromo Area - Bromo Sunrise Tour - Surabaya
itinerary_title: Mount Bromo and Return to Surabaya's Civilization
main_activities: Bromo sunrise tour, check-out, transfer to Surabaya.
customer_tips: If going directly to the airport, make sure your flight is after 5:00 PM.
overview: The day begins with a magical sunrise over Mount Bromo. After a volcanic adventure and a hearty breakfast, we'll drive you back down the mountains to Surabaya, concluding your adventure.

route: Bromo Area - Bromo Sunrise Tour - Madakaripura Waterfall - Surabaya
itinerary_title: Two Icons in One Day: Bromo & Madakaripura, Back to Surabaya
main_activities: Bromo tour, Madakaripura trekking, transfer to Surabaya.
customer_tips: You will get wet in Madakaripura, so bring a change of clothes and sandals.
overview: A day that combines the majesty of Bromo with the splendor of Madakaripura. After enjoying the sunrise, the adventure continues with a refreshing trek through the canyon of the legendary Madakaripura Waterfall, before we return you to Surabaya.

route: Bromo Area - Bromo Sunrise Tour - Bondowoso (Ijen Area)
itinerary_title: From Two Peaks: The Bromo Adventure Continues to the Foot of Ijen
main_activities: Bromo tour, long transfer, check-in,Health Check (MCU) at the hotel.
customer_tips: MCU: This is a mandatory procedure from the National Park. The screening is very simple and quick, involving only a basic check of your vital signs such as blood pressure to ensure you are fit to climb. MCU Fee: The MCU is already included in the package
overview: After witnessing the majesty of Bromo, your adventure continues east. This overland journey will take you to the Bondowoso highlands. Upon arrival, you'll undergo a comfortable mandatory medical check-up at your hotel before enjoying a hearty dinner.

route: Bromo Area - Bromo Sunrise Tour - Ketapang (Ferry to Bali)
itinerary_title: From Mount Bromo to the Gate of Bali (Ketapang Harbor)
main_activities: Bromo tour, very long land journey, arrived at the ferry port.
customer_tips: This route is very tiring. It's only recommended if you have a very tight schedule.
overview: A very long but efficient day for those of you who want to head straight to Bali after Bromo. After enjoying the sunrise, you'll traverse almost the entire length of East Java from west to east, ending at Ketapang Harbor.

route: Bromo Area - Bromo Sunrise Tour - Lumajang (Tumpak Sewu Area)
itinerary_title: From Volcano to Waterfall: The Journey from Bromo to the Tumpak Sewu Area
main_activities: Bromo tour, transfer to the south, check-in in Lumajang.
customer_tips: The road between Bromo and Lumajang can be less smooth.
overview: A challenging, off-the-beaten-path route. After enjoying the Bromo sunrise, you'll travel south along scenic rural roads to Lumajang to prepare to explore Tumpak Sewu Waterfall.

route: Bromo Area - Bromo Sunrise Tour - Malang Area
itinerary_title: From Volcanic Landscapes to the Charm of Cool Cities: Bromo to Malang
main_activities: Bromo tour, transfer to Malang, check-in.
customer_tips: Malang is a culinary paradise! Ask your guide for recommendations. Starting from the Tumpak Sewu Area (Lumajang)
overview: After an epic adventure on Mount Bromo, enjoy a scenic descent to Malang, a city known for its cool air and creative atmosphere. It's a seamless transition from wilderness to urban comfort.

route: Tumpak Sewu Area - Tumpak Sewu Waterfall Tour - Cemoro Lawang (Bromo Area)
itinerary_title: From the Hidden Paradise of Tumpak Sewu to the Land Above the Clouds of Bromo
main_activities: Tumpak Sewu trekking, long overland journey, check-in at Bromo.
customer_tips: Trekking Tumpak Sewu is challenging and wet. Wear appropriate shoes/sandals.
overview: Your morning will be filled with an unforgettable trekking adventure to the base of Tumpak Sewu Waterfall. Afterward, enjoy a well-prepared lunch before continuing the dramatic climb into the volcanic landscape of Bromo.

route: Tumpak Sewu Area - Tumpak Sewu Waterfall Tour - Bondowoso (Ijen Area)
itinerary_title: From Tumpak Sewu Canyon to the Foot of Mount Ijen
main_activities: Tumpak Sewu trekking, very long transfer, check-in,Health Check (MCU) at the hotel.
customer_tips: MCU: This is a mandatory procedure from the National Park. The screening is very simple and quick, involving only a basic check of your vital signs such as blood pressure to ensure you are fit to climb. MCU Fee: The MCU is already included in the package
overview: A long day of travel connecting two natural wonders. Your morning will be filled with trekking at Tumpak Sewu, followed by lunch. The afternoon will be spent on the long journey to Bondowoso, where you'll undergo a mandatory medical check-up at your hotel before enjoying a hearty dinner.

route: Tumpak Sewu Area - Tumpak Sewu Waterfall Tour - Surabaya
itinerary_title: Tumpak Sewu Waterfall Adventure and Return to Surabaya
main_activities: Tumpak Sewu trekking, transfer back to Surabaya.
customer_tips: If going directly to the airport, make sure your flight is after 8:00 PM.
overview: Experience the thrill of trekking to one of Indonesia's most beautiful waterfalls in the morning. After a rewarding adventure and a delicious lunch, enjoy a leisurely journey back to the metropolis of Surabaya to conclude your tour.

route: Tumpak Sewu Area - Tumpak Sewu Waterfall Tour - Malang
itinerary_title: From the Wonders of Tumpak Sewu to the Charm of Malang City
main_activities: Tumpak Sewu trekking, transfer to Malang, check-in.
customer_tips: This is one of the most time-efficient route combinations. Starting from Jember
overview: The perfect combination of natural adventure and city comfort. After conquering the Tumpak Sewu trail in the morning and enjoying lunch, you'll make the short journey to the cool city of Malang to rest.

route: Jember Hotel - Papuma Beach Sunset Tour - Jember Hotel
itinerary_title: The Charm of Sunset in Papuma: A Journey to White Sand Beach
main_activities: Trip to the beach, enjoy the view, watch the sunset.
customer_tips: Bring a camera to capture the beautiful sunset moments.
overview: Enjoy your morning with breakfast and free time at the hotel. In the afternoon, we'll travel to the famous Papuma Beach. Enjoy the view of the promontory jutting out into the sea, the soft white sand, and the iconic giant coral reefs. The highlight is witnessing a magical sunset over the Indian Ocean.

route: Jember Hotel - Coffee & Cocoa Technopark Tour - Jember Hotel
itinerary_title: Sweet Education: A Visit to the Coffee & Cocoa Science Technopark
main_activities: Educational tour of the plantation, see the processing process, taste the products.
customer_tips: A great opportunity to understand where your chocolate and coffee come from.
overview: After breakfast, delve into the fascinating world of coffee and cocoa in Jember. On this visit, you'll learn about the process of planting, harvesting, and processing coffee and cocoa beans into the products we know. It's a fun, educational and sensory experience.

route: Jember - Lumajang (Tumpak Sewu Area)
itinerary_title: Onward Transfer: From Jember to Tumpak Sewu Area
main_activities: Breakfast, check-out, overland travel, check-in in Lumajang.
customer_tips: This route is ideal after you have finished your activities in Jember in the morning/afternoon. Starting from Malang
overview: After breakfast at your Jember hotel and perhaps some free time, the journey continues in the afternoon. This route connects downtown Jember with the rural areas of Lumajang, setting you up in a prime location for your Tumpak Sewu Waterfall adventure the next day.

route: Malang Hotel - Malang City Tour - Malang Hotel
itinerary_title: A Day Full of Color: A Creative Exploration of Batu City, Malang
main_activities: Visiting thematic villages, flower gardens, natural photo spots, agrotourism.
customer_tips: Prepare your camera and power bank, every location is very photogenic.
overview: Start the day with breakfast at the hotel, then get ready for a fun day tour exploring the best photo spots and unique attractions in the cool Batu area, from colorful villages, modern flower gardens, to apple picking agrotourism.

route: Malang Hotel - City Tour - Lumajang (Tumpak Sewu Area)
itinerary_title: The Initial Journey from Malang to the Tumpak Sewu Gate
main_activities: Breakfast, check-out, overland travel, check-in in Lumajang.
customer_tips: This route is perfect if you want to enjoy the morning in Malang before continuing your journey.
overview: After breakfast, enjoy the morning in Malang. In the afternoon/evening, a short trip will take you south to Lumajang, in preparation for exploring Tumpak Sewu the next day.

route: Malang Hotel - Tumpak Sewu Waterfall Tour - Cemoro Lawang (Bromo Area)
itinerary_title: Golden Triangle Adventure: Malang, Tumpak Sewu, and Bromo in One Day
main_activities: Morning trip, Tumpak Sewu trekking, transfer to Bromo.
customer_tips: A busy day but very satisfying because of the time efficiency.
overview: The most efficient route to conquer two natural icons in one day from Malang. You'll depart early in the morning for a trek to Tumpak Sewu, enjoy lunch, and then continue your ascent to Mount Bromo in the afternoon.

route: Malang Hotel - Tumpak Sewu Waterfall Tour - Bondowoso (Ijen Area)
itinerary_title: Expedition from South to East: Malang, Tumpak Sewu, to Ijen
main_activities: Morning trip, Tumpak Sewu trekking, very long transfer,Health Check (MCU) at the hotel.
customer_tips: MCU: This is a mandatory procedure from the National Park. The screening is very simple and quick, involving only a basic check of your vital signs such as blood pressure to ensure you are fit to climb. MCU Fee: The MCU is already included in the package
overview: This route is for true adventurers with a lot of stamina. Starting in Malang, conquer Tumpak Sewu, enjoy lunch, then traverse much of southern and eastern Java to arrive in Bondowoso. Upon arrival, you'll undergo a mandatory medical check-up at your hotel before enjoying dinner.

route: Malang Hotel - Batu City Tour - Surabaya Hotel/Airport
itinerary_title: The Last Charm of Malang and Return to Surabaya
main_activities: Batu city tour, transfer to Surabaya.
customer_tips: If you plan to go directly to the airport, make sure your flight is after 8:00 PM.
overview: Enjoy the morning exploring the various tourist attractions in Batu and Malang. After a satisfying photo-op and adventure, continue your journey back to Surabaya, either to stay overnight or directly to the airport for your flight home.

route: Surabaya - Malang
itinerary_title: From Port City to Cool Highlands: Overland Journey from Surabaya to Malang
main_activities: Private pickup, road trip, check-in at city hotel.
accommodation_status: Check-in & Stay at a hotel in the Malang area.
customer_tips: Malang is cooler than Surabaya; bring a light jacket and ask your guide for local food recommendations.
overview: Leave the busy streets of Surabaya behind as you travel toward the cooler hills of Malang. This relaxed transfer day sets you up perfectly for exploring Batu and Malang attractions on the following day.

route: Ijen Area - Ketapang Ferry - Bali Hotel
itinerary_title: Leaving the Volcanoes Behind: Crossing from Ijen to Bali
main_activities: Breakfast, check-out, transfer to the port, ferry crossing, land tour in Bali.
customer_tips: You will "lose" 1 hour when you arrive in Bali due to the time zone change.
overview: After your final breakfast in the Ijen area, we drive you down to Ketapang Harbor to board the ferry to Bali. Enjoy the sea views during the short crossing before continuing overland to your hotel in southern Bali, where your volcano adventure gives way to island relaxation.

route: Ijen Area - Surabaya
itinerary_title: From Highlands to City Lights: Ijen Area to Surabaya
main_activities: Breakfast, check-out, long overland journey, arrival in Surabaya.
customer_tips: This is a long road journey; prepare snacks, music, and a neck pillow for comfort.
overview: Say goodbye to the Ijen highlands and settle in for a scenic drive across East Java. After a long but comfortable journey, you will arrive back in Surabaya, ready for your next flight or an extra night in the city.

route: Ijen Area - Lumajang (Tumpak Sewu Area)
itinerary_title: From Ijen Crater to the Gate of Tumpak Sewu
main_activities: Breakfast, check-out, overland journey, check-in at Tumpak Sewu homestay.
customer_tips: This is a connecting day before an early waterfall trek; sleep early and prepare a dry bag and sandals for tomorrow.
overview: After breakfast and check-out in the Ijen area, the journey continues south through rural Java toward Lumajang. This travel day positions you right by Tumpak Sewu, ready for an early start to explore one of Indonesia's most spectacular waterfalls.

route: Bromo Area - Bromo Sunrise Tour - Madakaripura Waterfall - Bondowoso (Ijen Area)
itinerary_title: From Bromo Sunrise to Canyon Waterfalls and Onward to Ijen
main_activities: Bromo tour, Madakaripura trekking, long transfer, Health Check (MCU) at the hotel.
customer_tips: You will get wet in Madakaripura, so bring a change of clothes and sandals. MCU: This is the procedure must from the National Park. The screening is very simple and quick, only involving checking your vital signs (such as blood pressure) to ensure you are fit enough to climb. MCU Fee: The MCU is already included in the package
overview: This is one of the most intense connection days in the itinerary. After witnessing sunrise and exploring Bromo, you continue to the lush canyon of Madakaripura for a refreshing waterfall trek before driving deep into the highlands of Bondowoso. Upon arrival, a mandatory health check is carried out at your hotel to clear you for the Ijen climb the next day, followed by a well-deserved dinner.

route: Bromo Area - Bromo Sunrise Tour - Madakaripura Waterfall - Malang
itinerary_title: Volcanoes, Waterfall Canyon, and City Comfort: Bromo & Madakaripura to Malang
main_activities: Bromo tour, Madakaripura trekking, transfer to Malang, check-in.
customer_tips: You will get wet in Madakaripura; bring a change of clothes and sandals. It is a busy but very rewarding day, so expect to be tired by the evening.
overview: Start the day with a breathtaking sunrise at Bromo and a visit to the crater. Continue with a dramatic canyon walk at Madakaripura Waterfall before heading to Malang, where you can unwind in a cooler city atmosphere after a full day of adventure.

route: Bromo Area - Bromo Sunrise Tour - Madakaripura Waterfall - Ketapang (Ferry to Bali)
itinerary_title: Bromo & Madakaripura Marathon: From Volcano Sunrise to the Gate of Bali
main_activities: Bromo tour, Madakaripura trekking, very long land journey, arrive at Ketapang Harbor.
customer_tips: This route is extremely long and tiring and is only recommended if you have a very tight schedule. You will get wet in Madakaripura, so bring a change of clothes and sandals.
overview: An ultra-efficient connection day for travellers who need to reach Bali quickly. After enjoying the sunrise and crater views at Bromo and trekking the canyon of Madakaripura, you will traverse much of East Java by road, ending at Ketapang Harbor ready for the ferry crossing to Bali on the following leg.

route: Bromo Area - Bromo Sunrise Tour - Madakaripura Waterfall - Lumajang (Tumpak Sewu Area)
itinerary_title: From Crater Rim to Canyon and Waterfall Gate: Bromo, Madakaripura & Tumpak Sewu
main_activities: Bromo tour, Madakaripura trekking, transfer to Lumajang, check-in.
customer_tips: You will get wet in Madakaripura; bring a change of clothes and sandals, and rest early in Lumajang to prepare for the challenging Tumpak Sewu trek the next day.
overview: This route strings together three icons in one day. Begin with sunrise at Bromo, continue with a canyon walk at Madakaripura, then drive south into the Lumajang highlands. You will arrive at a homestay near Tumpak Sewu, perfectly positioned for tomorrow’s early start.

route: Malang Hotel - Cemoro Lawang (Bromo Area)
itinerary_title: Climbing to the Sea of Sand: Transfer from Malang to Mount Bromo
main_activities: Pickup, scenic overland journey, check-in at mountain hotel.
accommodation_status: Check-in & Stay at hotels/homestays in the Bromo area.
customer_tips: Temperatures at Bromo can drop to 10-15°C. Pack a jacket and rest early.
overview: Depart from your hotel in Malang and drive up into the Tengger highlands. As the air gets cooler and the landscape turns more rugged, you will arrive in Cemoro Lawang, a village perched on the rim of the Bromo caldera, ready for the sunrise tour on the following day.
